title: Cosmos Heroes
description: a hero mod that works with palladium mod
body:
The Pack known as Viper Heroes is no more, replaced by the more advanced Cosmos Heroes.

Credits:

Emoflix (me) - Code and Texture

Zago - Shinigami Suits, Hollow Mask and Zanpakuto Modeler

[Mücahit - Excalibur, Demon Blood Sword, Night Sword Modeler](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mugiwara_no_mucahid/)                          
A Superhero mod that works with [palladium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/threetag-palladium) mod.

[Atrox - 2 Zangetsu Modeler](https://www.curseforge.com/members/atrox/projects)

Powers And Tiers:


S Tier; Solar Energy Absorption ,Plunder (This power can steal almost every power )

S- Tier; Kryptonian, Visual Mimicry (This power can copy almost every power)

A Tier; Daxamite (Dc Comics), Anti-Matter Manipulation, Dimensional Distortion, Speed Force User (Speedster), Sentochihiro no sakura / 千と千尋の桜

B Tier; Supe (Homelander Tv Series), Lightning Manipulation, Weapon XI, Multiple Recovery, Remamber Me (Light manip)

C tier; Soldier Boy, Enhanced Titan Form

To get the powers, craft Modified Hougyoku and right click on it and you now have the power (if you had a power from Cosmos before, it will be deleted and replaced with the same or different power, depending on your luck):

![Hougyoku](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3bbbef75b64d91abe0179c2ace803839aa39901.png)

You need This mods:


Palladium 
Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge)

Architectury API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge)

Condensed Creative

Cupboard

Curios API (Forge/NeoForge)

GeckoLib

KubeJS

Moonlight Lib

Packet Fixer

Pehkui

Rhino

Warning: Do not re-upload, steal, or copy anything.


You can use this mod on any minecraft server you want.
